title: Cyberpunk Loading Screen
description: This is a resource pack which replaces the standard Mojang logo with the Cyberpunk 2077 logo.
body:
![Screenshot](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/559b1beb4f36f1d07554a8f20fc95221137951f9_0.webp)
The original **Cyberpunk Loading Screen** resourcepack based on my [CurseForge resourcepack](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/cyberpunkloadingscreen).

CyberpunkLoadingScreen - this resource pack replaces the standard Mojang logo at boot with the Cyberpunk 2077 logo. Optifine required. Enjoy!

_WARNING: versions from 1.19.3 to 1.20.0 inclusive are not supported due to Minecraft or OptiFine bug. Consider using 1.20.1+._

By likespro.
